notes: Directional adverb indicating movement outward or beyond a boundary. Often used as a separable prefix in verbs like 'hinausgehen', 'hinauswerfen'. Also used in phrases like 'über etwas hinaus' (beyond something).

sentences.german: Er ging hinaus in den Garten.
sentences.english: He went outside into the garden.

sentences.german: Über diesen Preis hinaus kann ich nichts anbieten.
sentences.english: Beyond this price, I cannot offer anything.
